security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'self' data: blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Mailwind is a local-first desktop email app for Gmail, Google Workspace, and IMAP/SMTP accounts.
